{% extends "base.html" %} {% load static %} {% block content %}
Video Darslar
{% for video in videos %}
{% with u=video.youtube_url %} {% if "watch?v=" in u %} {# watch?v=ID&t=... bo‘lsa ID ni ajratamiz #} {% with vid=u|cut:"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v="|cut:"http://www.youtube.com/watch?v="|cut:"https://youtube.com/watch?v="|cut:"http://youtube.com/watch?v=" %} {% with vid=vid|cut:"&t=5s"|cut:"&t=5"|cut:"&t=10s"|cut:"&t=10"|cut:"&si=" %} {% endwith %} {% endwith %} {% else %} {# youtu.be/ID bo‘lsa ID ni ajratamiz #} {% with vid=u|cut:"https://youtu.be/"|cut:"http://youtu.be/"|cut:"https://www.youtube.com/embed/"|cut:"http://www.youtube.com/embed/"|cut:"?t=5s"|cut:"&t=5s"|cut:"?t=5"|cut:"&t=5"|cut:"?si="|cut:"&si=" %} {% endwith %} {% endif %} {% endwith %}
{{ video.lesson_number }}-dars: {{ video.title }}
YouTube’da ko‘rish
{% endfor %}
{% endblock %}
